scenarios.title: Distributed PyTorch Training and Large Model Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Distributed training loops, launchers, DeepSpeed/FSDP/TPU backends, PyTorch Lightning/Fabric, scalable GNN training, checkpoints, and memory planning.
scenarios.role: Use verl for LLM post-training workflows: setup, data and rewards, PPO/GRPO/SFT configs, rollout tools, checkpoints, profiling, and repository maintenance.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `verl` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: checkpoints and model ops, data and rewards, repo development, rollout and tools, setup and backends, and training and configs.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `verl` when the request names `verl`, centers on LLM post-training workflows: setup, data and rewards, PPO/GRPO/SFT configs, rollout tools, checkpoints, profiling, and repository maintenance, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in distributed pytorch training and large model workflows. Then route to checkpoints and model ops, data and rewards, repo development, or rollout and tools when those focused workflows match.
